name: nococli
description: Keep your code yours — remove AI co-author signatures from git commits

scripts.build: bun build ./src/cli.ts ./src/install.ts ./src/uninstall.ts ./src/types.ts ./src/utils/logger.ts ./src/utils/paths.ts ./src/utils/hook.ts ./src/utils/git.ts --outdir ./dist --target bun && bun build ./src/cli.ts ./src/install.ts ./src/uninstall.ts ./src/types.ts ./src/utils/logger.ts ./src/utils/paths.ts ./src/utils/hook.ts ./src/utils/git.ts --outdir ./dist --target node && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='./dist/cli.js'; fs.writeFileSync(p, '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' + fs.readFileSync(p, 'utf8'));"
